name: BigCommerce
description: Connect to your BigCommerce store to sync products, orders, and customers into Shielva.

install_fields.label: Store Hash
install_fields.description: Your BigCommerce store hash from the store URL (e.g. 'abc123' from abc123.mybigcommerce.com or store-abc123.mybigcommerce.com).

install_fields.label: API Access Token
install_fields.description: BigCommerce API access token. Generate from BigCommerce Control Panel → Advanced Settings → API Accounts.
